info.anubanDaviSezaH: 1.936 glAsnAvanuvamAM ca iti gaRasUtreRa ayaM DAtuH upasargasya anupasTitO vikalpena mittvaM prApnoti
info.english_meaning: to bathe to cleanse to purify
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: snAtIti SOce snassnAyediti cecCantI kecana ' (Slo.11) - devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'samudraM vA ete prasnAnti ye saMvatsaraM (saMvatsarasADyaM gavAmayanam) upayanti' (tARqyabrA॰5.8.5) prasnAnti apravagAhante
'tIrTena yaTA samudraM nAyuH' (Sa॰brA॰12.2.1.1) prasnAyuriti snAterliNi rUpam praviSeyurityarTaH
'yo vA aplavaH samudraM prasnAti na sa tata udeti' (paYca0 brA0 4517) prasnAti avagAhate praviSati
'mA no devAnAM viSaH prasnAtIrivosrAH kfSaM na hAsuraDniyAH' (tE0 saM0 26112) prasnAtIH trasnuvatIH prasnutAH
'karasnO bAhU karmaRAM prasnAtArO' (ni0 6171) prasnAtArO nirvartayitArAviti durgaH
prasnAnyasminniti prasnaH snAnIyaM bfhad BAjanam GaYarTe kAviDAnaM sTAsnApAvyaDiniyuDyarTam iti snAteH kaH
'apasnAta ivArizwaM praviveSa gfhottamam' (rA॰2.42.22) priyasya banDorniDane sati OrDvadehikIH kriyAH kartuM snAto'pasnAta ucyate
'udvartanamapasnAnaM viRmUtre raktameva ca' (manu॰4.132) apasnAnaM snAnodakaM snAnaSizwaM jalam
'anyasya cAvasnAtaM dUrataH parivarjayet' (BA0 anu0 10459) avasnAtaM yatrAnyena pUrvaM snAtam
'vizamityudakanAma vizRAte rvipUrvasya snAteH SudDyarTasya' (ni0 12261)
'vivAhe kftyAM yAM cakrurAsnAne tAM nidaDmasi' (aTarva0 18265) AsnAnaM snAnArTakaM jalam
'SabdabrahmaRi nizRAto na nizRAyAtpare yadi' (BA0 pu0 111118) na nizRAyAt kOSalaM nApnuyAt
'nizRAtopi ca vedAnte sADutvaM nEti durjanaH' (BA0 vi0 187) nizRAtaH kuSalaH
'SabdabrahmaRi nizRAtaH paraM brahmADigacCati' ukto'rTaH
'tatra tatra ca nizRAtAnaDyakzAnkuSalAYSucIn' (yAjYa0 1322) nizRAtAn ananyavyApArAn iti mitAkzarA
'yaH kaScidarTo nizRAtaH svarucyA tu parasparam' (yAjYa0 284) nizRAta iyatA kAlenEtAvad deyamiyatI ca vfdDiH pratimAsaM deyetyevaM vyavasTitaH
'nizRAtaSca samAgamopi vihitastvatpreyasaH kAntayA' (mAlatI0 1024) nizRAtaH sAkalyena nirvfttaH
'ArdraH praTasnurBuvanasya gopAH Sfta utsnAti janitA matInAm' (tE0 brA0 3753) utsnAti jalAduttarati nirgacCati
'ta utsnAya rayimaBipra tasTuH' (f0 2155) ukto'rTaH
'sUtraM pratizRAtam' (pA0 8390) SudDamityarTaH sUtrAdanyatra pratisnAtamityeva api susnAto BavAn bAQaM pratisnAtosmi
'gacCa mAgaDikAmAnayopasnAnena' (avi0 5)
